queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the correlation between negative checking account balances and heightened credit default risk.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Determinants of credit risk associated with the absence of a checking account and increased default likelihood.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Investigation into the association between savings balances below 100 DM and reduced credit risk exposure.
